text:
List (リスト, Risuto) is one of the Game Masters and creators of Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 184 He lives in the castle of Greed Island along with Dwun, in the game's capital city, Limeiro. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 183 

Appearance

List is a youthful-looking, short man with messy blond hair and thin freckles over his nose. He wears a purple dress shirt with a small blue tie. He also has black dress shoes with black pants and overall straps.

Personality

List has accommodating, cordial manners and is often seen wearing a polite smile on his face. He did, however, lose his composure when Ging seemed unwilling to talk to Gon again.

Background

List and the other Game Masters created Greed Island together and released it in 1987. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 69 

Plot

Greed Island arc

List cordially welcomes Gon to Limeiro when he enters the castle. He then leads Gon to his associate Dwun's room, where he introduces Dwun to him. Dwun presents Gon with the "Ruler's Blessing" card and informs him that he won't be able to find any clues about Ging or his location (which isn't on Greed Island). List suggests that they move on to the next event, and Dwun then presents Gon with a case that he can use to take three cards outside the game. Dwun asks him whether he wants the generic ending or the one specifically for him, but List reveals that Dwun is just messing around and that the latter doesn't exist. With the game business out of the way, List finally introduces himself and Dwun as friends of Ging. List also reveals that the initials of the G.I. Game Masters' first names make up the game's title. 

Ging is the G, Razor the R, Eta and Elena the two Es, while List is the L and Dwun one of the Ds. List also mentions that a parade will be held to celebrate Gon's achievement, adding that he will get to choose his three cards at the harbor and reach the ending of the game. Dwun tells Gon the story about how his name was changed from Wdwune to simply Dwun by Ging since he needed the initial for the game's title. List says that Ging had Dwun's name changed in less than a minute, simply using a computer and phone, and with his name change, Dwun's luck apparently changed for the better as well. 

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

In the first round of the 13th Hunter Chairman Election, List appears to vote for the new Chairman. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 320 He is seen again later with Dwun and others visiting Gon in the hospital. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 324 He is seen as Ickshonpe Katocha gives his speech before the election's eighth round. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 32, Chapter 331 He and Dwun both sit next to Ging in the front row. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 32, Chapter 332 Before the top 4 candidates start their debate, List is seen using his phone. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 32, Chapter 333 During the ninth round, when Gon appears after making a full recovery, Dwun waves at Gon, while List points at Ging, much to Ging's dismay. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 32, Chapter 334 After Gon spots his father, List smirks with Dwun at Ging, who seemingly loathes the two for pointing him out. When Ging seems reticent to talk to Gon again, List joins the chorus of Hunters rebuking Ging. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 32, Chapter 335 

Abilities & Powers

List has all the benefits granted by his status as a Hunter.

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, List is capable of using Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60 and as a Game Master of Greed Island, he's likely proficient in it.
